notes: South Korean UV filter specialist with deep expertise in Asian-market approved actives, including filters not yet approved in EU or FDA markets. Sunjin Beauty Science is a key supplier for K-beauty and ASEAN sun care formulations, offering KFDA-approved UV filter combinations at competitive pricing. Essential for brands targeting Asian markets or seeking diverse UV filter portfolios beyond EU/FDA-approved actives.
